nodes.label: Home Screen — Returning User Onboarding State

properties.banner_subtitle: El reto que está cambiando la mente de 2,400 mentexianos
properties.body_copy: Tu mente merece un momento sin ruido. Empieza eligiendo cuánto, qué apps callar y qué rutinas habitar.
properties.section_subtitle: Estas apps no te interrumpirán durante el enfoque
properties.description: Home screen in returning-user / pre-session state. Shows personalized greeting with user name 'Juan', session duration picker (15/30/45 min / 1 hora), list of apps to block during focus (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X, Facebook), and a community challenge banner ('30 días sin redes sociales'). Dev Tweaks overlay also visible.
Horizontal pill selector allowing user to choose focus session duration before starting: 15 min, 30 min, 45 min, or 1 hora.

nodes.label: App Block List — Focus Session App Selection

properties.section_subtitle: Estas apps no te interrumpirán durante el enfoque
properties.description: List of social/distraction apps toggled for blocking during a focus session. Each row shows app icon, name, category, and a toggle switch. An 'Agregar apps' CTA allows expanding the list.

nodes.label: Community Challenge Banner — 30 Days No Social Media

properties.label: NUEVA META
properties.title: 30 días sin redes sociales
properties.subtitle: El reto que está cambiando la mente de 2,400 mentexianos
properties.description: Promotional banner on Home screen advertising a community challenge: 30 days without social media, with 2,400 participants. CTA is 'Unirme al reto'.
